source_pr.title: stats: fix estimation for pseudo equal row count
source_pr.body:
The equal row count for primary key should be at most 1.
PTAL @coocood @winoros

symptoms: sql: "select * from t where t.c = 1 and t.a > 1 order by t.d limit 1", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t where t.c = 1 and t.a > 1 order by t.d limit 1", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t where t.c = 1 and t.a > 1 order by t.d limit 1", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
